text: DMat.*(that: DMat) now takes (using Backend), routing the general product to backend.denseDouble.gemm when acceleratesGemm && rows*cols*shared >= nativeGemmMinFlops; AᵀA fast-path stays pure. No-import resolves companion given pure -> byte-identical (whole suite green). Fresh-context review: SAFE TO COMMIT (branch order correct, arg lists identical, no init hazard, no eta/section breakage). Fixed its finding #1 (IMPORTANT): sized SMat.* and syntax unicode.× were silently capturing Backend.pure -> now thread (using Backend) so an imported backend routes through them too. Added reviewer test gaps (strided routed product, given-in-scope ergonomic route, NativeBlas disjunct). Documented the linalg<->backend<->spectral compilation-unit cycle (§A.5) and element-count threshold convention. Green: coreJVM 365, coreJS 362, laws/interop/parity/benches unaffected.
